hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\bgh\b'; then if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'apache/nuttx(-apps)?|pybricks/pybricks-micropython'; then if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(create|comment|close|reopen|edit|delete|merge|review|transfer|pin|unpin|lock|unlock|-X (POST|PUT|PATCH|DELETE)|--method (POST|PUT|PATCH|DELETE))'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Upstream repo への書き込み操作はブロックされています。"}'; exit 2; fi; fi; fi; }
